title.en: HINGES OR SUSPENSION DEVICES FOR DOORS, WINDOWS OR WINGS (pivotal connections in general F16C11/00)
Pinless hinges; Substitutes for hinges
made of one piece
with guide members shaped as circular arcs
consisting of two easily-separable parts
Hinges with pins {(E05D7/08 takes precedence)}
with one pin
with two or more pins (E05D7/08 takes precedence)
Construction of single parts, e.g. the parts for attachment
Parts for attachment, e.g. flaps
Pins, sockets or sleeves; Removable pins (E05D15/522 takes precedence)
Hinges or pivots of special construction (used for special suspension arrangements E05D15/00; so as to be self-closing E05F1/06, E05F1/12; with means for raising wings before being turned E05F7/02)
{Adjustable hinges (E05D7/04 takes precedence)}
{Elongate hinges, e.g. piano-hinges}
for use on the right-hand as well as the left-hand side; Convertible right-hand or left-hand hinges
Hinges adjustable relative to the wing or the frame
to allow tilting of the members
for use in suspensions comprising two spigots placed at opposite edges of the wing, especially at the top and the bottom, e.g. trunnions {(E05D15/266 takes precedence)}
to allow easy separation {or connection} of the parts at the hinge axis ({E05D5/12 and E05D15/50 take precedence } ; substitutes for hinges E05D1/06)
to allow easy detachment of the hinge from the wing or the frame {(E05D15/507 takes precedence)}
Hinges for safes
Flaps or sleeves specially designed for making from particular material, e.g. hoop-iron, sheet metal, plastics
{from plastics (E05D1/02 takes precedence)}
Additional features or accessories of hinges {(edge protecting devices E06B3/88)}
{Templates for marking the position of fittings on wings or frames (implements for making doors, windows or frames E04F21/003)}
{Anti-tamper devices}
{Covers, e.g. for protection}
{for transmitting energy, e.g. electrical cable routing}
{Impact absorbing hinges for vehicle doors}
Lubricating arrangements
relating to the use of free balls as bearing-surfaces (E05D7/06 takes precedence)
Devices for limiting the opening movement of hinges
Friction devices between relatively-movable hinge parts (E05D7/086 takes precedence)
Devices for preventing movement between relatively-movable hinge parts

Accessories for sliding or lifting wings, e.g. pulleys, safety catches ({closers or openers for horizontally sliding wings E05F1/02, E05F1/08}; counterbalance devices {for swinging wings} E05F1/00, E05F3/00)
{Anti-dropping devices (E05D13/1223, E05D13/1246, E05D13/1269, E05D13/1292 take precedence)}
{Fasteners specially adapted for holding sliding wings open (for holding wings closed E05C)}
{Counterbalance devices}
Suspension arrangements for wings (arrangements of wings not characterised by the construction of the supporting means E06B3/32)
for revolving wings
with arms fixed on the wing pivoting about an axis outside of the wing
for wings sliding horizontally more or less in their own plane
for wings sliding vertically more or less in their own plane
for folding wings
supported on arms movable in horizontal plane
moving along slide-ways so arranged that one guide-member of the wing moves in a direction substantially perpendicular to the movement of another guide member
supported on arms movable in vertical planes
allowing alternative movements ({E05D15/0604 takes precedence } ; for vertically-sliding wings E05D15/22)
with successive different movements {(raising wings before being turned E05F7/02)}
Hinges or other suspension devices especially for doors or windows
Hinges with one pivot axis and one bearing surface
Hinges with one pivot axis and more than one bearing surface
Various door and window fittings, e.g. suspension devices for double hung windows or screens

Suspension devices for doors or windows movable in a direction perpendicular to their plane or pivotable about an axis being situated at a considerable distance from the edge of the wing by means of pivot arms
